inputs.label: Testing Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance between patient and eye chart in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between patient and eye chart in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hasta ile göz tablosu arasındaki mesafe (feet).
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen Patient und Sehtafel in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre le patient et le tableau de vision en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre el paciente y la tabla optométrica en pies.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة بين المريض ولوحة العيون بالقدم.

inputs.label: Letter Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the smallest readable Snellen letter in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the smallest readable Snellen letter in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Okunabilen en küçük Snellen harfinin milimetre cinsinden yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des kleinsten lesbaren Snellen-Buchstabens in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de la plus petite lettre Snellen lisible en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de la letra Snellen más pequeña legible en milímetros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ارتفاع أصغر حرف يمكن قراءته من لوحة سنيلن بالمليمترات.

inputs.label: Snellen Numerator
inputs.businessContext: Standard testing distance numerator, typically 20 for feet or 6 for meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard testing distance numerator, typically 20 for feet or 6 for meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart test mesafesi payı, genellikle feet için 20 veya metre için 6.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Testentfernungszähler, typischerweise 20 für Fuß oder 6 für Meter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Numérateur de distance de test standard, généralement 20 pour les pieds ou 6 pour les mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Numerador de distancia de prueba estándar, típicamente 20 para pies o 6 para metros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: بسط مسافة الاختبار القياسية، عادة 20 للقدم أو 6 للأمتار.

inputs.label: Override Denominator
inputs.businessContext: If known, directly set the Snellen denominator; otherwise calculated from distance and letter height.

businessContext_i18n.en: If known, directly set the Snellen denominator; otherwise calculated from distance and letter height.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biliniyorsa Snellen paydasını doğrudan ayarlayın; aksi halde mesafe ve harf yüksekliğinden hesaplanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Falls bekannt, Snellen-Nenner direkt festlegen; sonst aus Entfernung und Buchstabenhöhe berechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si connu, définir directement le dénominateur Snellen ; sinon calculé à partir de la distance et de la hauteur de la lettre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si se conoce, establezca directamente el denominador Snellen; de lo contrario, se calcula a partir de la distancia y la altura de la letra.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان معروفًا، قم بتعيين مقام سنيلن مباشرة؛ وإلا يُحسب من المسافة وارتفاع الحرف.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
